FundraisersSpecial_Events__c+
City_of_St_Louis_CDBG__c + Corporate_Contributions__c + Endowments__c + Interest_Income__c + Investment_Income__c + Other__c + Other_Federal_Grants__c + State_Grants__c + In_Kind_Income__c + Fee_Revenue__c + Other_1_Revenue__c + Other_2_Revenue__c
